'''yawoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyoodle|kyoodle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyoodle|kyoodle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yawoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæweheth|yæweheth]] || [[word:yæwehej|yæwehej]] || [[word:yæwehesh|yæwehesh]] || [[word:yæwehe|yæwehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yawowohoth|yawowohoth]] || [[word:yawowohoj|yawowohoj]] || [[word:yawowohosh|yawowohosh]] || [[word:yawowoho|yawowoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yawohoth|yawohoth]] || [[word:yawohoj|yawohoj]] || [[word:yawohosh|yawohosh]] || [[word:yawoho|yawoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yawofhoth|yawofhoth]] || [[word:yawofhoj|yawofhoj]] || [[word:yawofhosh|yawofhosh]] || [[word:yawofhof|yawofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yawohotho|yawohotho]] || [[word:yawohojo|yawohojo]] || [[word:yawohosho|yawohosho]] || [[word:yawohoko|yawohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yawohoth|yawohoth]] || [[word:yawohoj|yawohoj]] || [[word:yawohosh|yawohosh]] || [[word:yawoho|yawoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yawohothol|yawohothol]] || [[word:yawohojol|yawohojol]] || [[word:yawohoshol|yawohoshol]] || [[word:yawohokol|yawohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yawohothotho|yawohothotho]] || [[word:yawohojojo|yawohojojo]] || [[word:yawohoshosho|yawohoshosho]] || [[word:yawohoko|yawohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yawohothon|yawohothon]] || [[word:yawohojon|yawohojon]] || [[word:yawohoshon|yawohoshon]] || [[word:yawohokon|yawohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yawohothoro|yawohothoro]] || [[word:yawohojoro|yawohojoro]] || [[word:yawohoshoro|yawohoshoro]] || [[word:yawohokoro|yawohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
